Trusted Wholesale Partner

Authorized Online Retail Partner for Brands

Purfavor partners with brands and distributors to purchase inventory at scale, maintain pricing integrity, and represent products professionally across Amazon marketplaces. Operations currently support distribution across both Amazon UK and Amazon US marketplaces.

Explore Brand PartnershipsContact Our Team

Based in Coventry, United Kingdom · info@purfavor.com

Trust & Credentials

  • Registered Company: MAM Enterprise Ltd
  • Business documents available upon request
  • Professional communication and due diligence process
  • Committed to transparent and compliant collaboration

Who We Work With

We partner with organizations that value controlled distribution, policy alignment, and professional marketplace operations.

Brands Seeking Controlled Amazon Distribution

  • MAP policy protection
  • Consistent pricing & representation
  • Long-term brand growth focus

Authorized Distributors

  • Inventory-backed purchasing
  • Professional listing management
  • Transparent reporting

Manufacturers Expanding to Marketplaces

  • Marketplace strategy & execution
  • Account management
  • Sustainable growth support

How We Protect Your Brand

MAP Compliance

We strictly follow pricing policies and prevent unauthorized discounting.

Controlled Distribution

We only source inventory from approved suppliers and brands.

Professional Representation

We ensure accurate listings, images, and brand consistency.

Long-Term Partnership Focus

We prioritize sustainable relationships over short-term sales.

Purfavor

Purfavor is a retail distribution company operated by MAM Enterprise Ltd, specializing in wholesale purchasing and marketplace distribution across Amazon.
